basics.name: Andre Wong
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.S. in Computer Engineering in the Faculty of Engineering at the National University of Singapore. I expect to graduate in August, 2023.

work.summary: Communicated with customers enquiring about taxes and methodically explain subsequent actions required to take
highlights: Clarified with customers on any doubts on taxation laws
Convinced customers to switch from doing paper taxes to doing taxes electronically

volunteer.organization: Overseas Community Involvement Programme to Myanmar
volunteer.summary: We went to Mother's Home to help out
highlights: Volunteered to practice interview questions with teenagers; Conducted a mock trial interview for a job.
Taught children to play soccer and frisbee; Learned to play Myanmar’s traditional game, Htoke See Toe.
Facilitated children on how to construct a paper pencil holder with 4 other volunteers to make 20 pencil holders.
Tutored children on how to speak simple English; Younger children learn counting from 1 to 10 while older children learn about animals and construction sentences.
